# Justin Purnell

> Founder of Ledge Partners. Former Goldman Sachs credit analyst, Head of Product at Hotels at Home (Marriott), VP at NBCUniversal. Princeton '00, Tuck MBA.

## About

Justin Purnell is the founder of Ledge Partners, a strategic advisory firm helping growth-stage companies translate complex strategy into measurable results. His career spans Wall Street (Goldman Sachs, 7 years, 400+ published research pieces), digital media (NBCUniversal, UCB Comedy), and e-commerce (Hotels at Home / Marriott International, 70+ branded storefronts).

## Sections

- [About](https://www.justinpurnell.com/about/): Full biography and background
- [CV](https://www.justinpurnell.com/cv/): Complete curriculum vitae with experience, education, and skills
- [Portfolio](https://www.justinpurnell.com/portfolio/): Digital products and sites built
- [Projects](https://www.justinpurnell.com/projects/): Open-source and technical projects
- [BusinessMath](https://www.justinpurnell.com/businessmath/): Financial computation framework and blog

## Key Facts

- Education: Princeton University '00 (AB Economics), Tuck School of Business at Dartmouth (MBA)
- Technical: Swift, Python, AI/ML, data science, open-source contributor
- Leadership: President of Princeton Class of 2000, Co-President Tuck Club of New York
- Open Source: BusinessMath (Swift financial computation framework)
